name: Customiser App
description:
My take on a Reality Customising Alteration App thingy...

As the name implies, you have the ability t customise EVERYTHING. I tested it out myself and was positively surprised, so please give it a shot. If anything doesn't work or needs fixing, do tell.

Also if you wanna know more about the App, ask for like an "App Tour" or similar, or ask for the "NPC Creation". If you don't understand a feature, just ask the App.

Improvement suggestions and feedback or even a like are always appreciated ^^. I want you to have a great experience with these lil chatbots of mine.

Also BIG Thanks to well over 200 followers and for over 10k chats on my Penny Shower bot. I never thought my bots would get numbers this high or anything, but I'm very grateful ^^
creator: Etoro
